ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "time_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time type the tag is valid for */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object type the tag is associated with */,
  "synchronization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the synchronization type of the tag */,
  "end_of_validity" INTEGER /* End of the validity period of the tag (-1 if unlimited) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "last_validated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last validation of the tag */,
  "insertion_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was inserted into the system */,
  "modification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification of the tag */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the tag */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tag (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* Validation rules associated with the tag */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies between tags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_object_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("object_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_synchronization_id FOREIGN KEY ("synchronization_id") REFERENCES synchronization_types ("synchronization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_time_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_type_id") REFERENCES time_types ("time_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_types" (
  "time_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time type */,
  "time_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the time type (e.g., Run, Luminosity Block) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the time type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type (e.g., JetCorrectorParametersCollection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synchronization_types" (
  "synchronization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synchronization type */,
  "synchronization_name" TEXT /* Name of the synchronization type (e.g., any, specific) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the synchronization type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the synchronization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synchronization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "research_group" TEXT /* Research group of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag being validated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the validation event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "validation_comments" TEXT /* Comments associated with the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_validations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_validations_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification event */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the modification event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification made (e.g., update, deletion) */,
  "modified_values" TEXT /* Values before and after the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_modifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_modifications_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_uses" (
  "use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the tag */,
  "use_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the usage event */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis or experiment using the tag */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis or experiment */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis or experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_uses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_uses_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment made (e.g., question, feedback) */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_comments_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
